history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian man with dark, wavy hair is posing for a photo in an outdoor seating area at night. He is wearing a white polo shirt with various black logos and the number "13" prominently displayed on the left chest. He also wears light grey sweatpants and white Nike sneakers. He is holding a dark-colored smartphone in his right hand and has a watch on his left wrist.

The background features lush green plants with large leaves, some of which are illuminated by warm, yellow-toned lights from below, creating a serene and inviting atmosphere. In the middle ground, a small body of water with lily pads is visible. Further back, two other individuals are seated at a table. One appears to be a man in a grey t-shirt, and the other is a woman wearing a hijab and a black and white checkered top. They are sitting on chairs around a low table.

The setting seems to be a cafe or restaurant with tiled flooring and a textured, light-colored wall in the background. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, with the primary light source appearing to be artificial, casting soft shadows and highlighting the plants. The overall color palette consists of muted tones of green, grey, white, and black, with accents of warm yellow from the lighting. The mood is relaxed and casual, capturing a moment of leisure. The style of the image is a realistic, candid-style photograph.
